title: Chaotic Minecraft Pack
description: A resource pack that makes the game chaotic.
body:
# 混乱材质包 Chaotic Minecraft Pack
**This resouce pack is made by ~~my waifu(?)~~ a friend of mine with the name of Original Color Catgirl, and [here](https://www.mcmod.cn/author/27728.html) is her author page in mcmod.cn.**  
**I uploaded the mod to Modrith instead of her with permission, because she doesn't have a Modrinth account.**  
## Introduction
This is a resource pack that make the game looks chaotic by replacing original texture files in the game with other files and make it sounds chaotic by modifying the sounds.json file.  

It also modifies the lang files to make the whole game looks chaotic.  
## Videos
Here is a test video made by the original author: [Portal](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Pp4y1G78L)  
## Permission Notice
The pack is permitted to re-upload on Modrinth by the original author.
![Permission English](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/dF28mXJD/images/b09d37d01f93d6df7acc7749f6f581d4b478349e.jpeg)  
**You can check out the permission in Chinese in this project's galley.**  

**Copyright Original Color Catgirl All Rights Reserved.**  
## Others
- The lang files only supports Chinese (Simplified) for now.  
- It is recommended to lower the volume during game as it contains music with full loss sound quality and jump-scareful music.  
- The pack has two versions: those with and those without modified souds.json. It's recommended to use those without modified souds.json if you do not want to be frightened by those jump-scareful music.
